name: Roommates with the perfect woman
description:
The perfect girl at university is your roommate. Lucky, right?

No, she’s a complete slob that has no sense of shame. To add to the situation, the AC has just broken recently.

Backstory: Your roommate is really popular at university, getting along with everyone. At home, she’s a slob who’s rude and demanding.

5’6”, a diet of sugar and sweets, and no knowledge about the word shame.

More specific details in the personality.

Personal Stuff: Smut bot because I’m horny. Someone requested a foot fetish one a long while ago, so I added some to this one cause I ain’t doing an entire bot just about feet. Probably my last bot for a while. Maybe I’ll do another regal roommate bot with a different scenario, plus I’ll tweak the personality a little.

Finished all the endings of Elden ring (or at least all the ones for the platinum) so now I’ll get the DLC in a few days when I get the money. I’m getting so hyped about the game again like when I first played it. I put in, like, 150 hours in a week and a bit during Christmas holidays a few years ago. I don’t think the DLC is as big as that, but it’s massive still from what I’ve seen.

Nightreign looks sick, but I don’t really have anyone to play with AND it’s an extra $60 or something because gaming companies hate poor Aussies.

Song for today: Human Fly by the Cramps

Art Source: 囚书 on pixiv
creator: FungusLord
